esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-prometheusreceiver.otel-*
// KV admission slots fully used; incoming work queued, latency increases
| WHERE metrics.admission_granter_total_slots_kv IS NOT NULL
  AND metrics.admission_granter_used_slots_kv IS NOT NULL
  AND metrics.admission_granter_total_slots_kv > 0
| EVAL slot_util = metrics.admission_granter_used_slots_kv / metrics.admission_granter_total_slots_kv
// Alert when utilisation >= 95%; tune threshold for your cluster
| WHERE slot_util >= 0.95
| STATS slot_util = MAX(slot_util), used = MAX(metrics.admission_granter_used_slots_kv), total = MAX(metrics.admission_granter_total_slots_kv)
  BY resource.attributes.service.instance.id, attributes.node_id
| SORT slot_util DESC
